title: Healthfinch - Prior Authorization and Prescription Renewal Automation
problem: Prior authorization and prescription renewals are manual, repetitive tasks that consume significant staff time.
solution: Automation platform for prior authorization and prescription renewals. Integration with EHR workflows. Reduces manual work for administrative tasks.
varden_fit: HIGH — Healthfinch proves automation of repetitive admin tasks creates value. European practices need similar automation.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Automating repetitive admin tasks is unsexy but valuable. European practices lack similar automation tools.
